title: Feedback - send a Other feedback with names/email
scenario: "Other" feedback sent from App Settings > Feedback does not include user's name and email
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to App Settings.
4. Select the "Other" option as the feedback category.
5. Enter text for the feedback body.
6. Enter the user's name and email address in the provided fields.
expected: Feedback is sent with the user's name and email attached.
